moral_expl: Convincing her to return home could put her in harm's way.

scenario: Someone makes an obscene gesture in a cemetery for military veterans
circumstance: A rebellious teenager acts out to provoke a reaction from authorities or peers.
moral_expl: Disrespectful behavior driven by immaturity and desire for attention.

scenario: Because of the economic crisis of the last year, the company you work for has closed and you have lost your job. Recently you have been looking for a new job, but without success. You realise that you need some experience in computer technology and are convinced that you will be employed much more easily if this experience is on your CV.You insert false information in your CV about your ability in information technology. You know that in this way you will be considered above the other more qualified candidates and get the job.
circumstance: Feeling desperate and pressured to provide for oneself and family during economic hardship.
moral_expl: The scenario is driven by a sense of urgency and responsibility to secure a job.

scenario: Yelled at the delivery man because he was late
circumstance: Waiting for a time-sensitive delivery, such as medicine or food, for a family member in need.
moral_expl: The person is stressed and worried about the impact of the delay on their loved one.

scenario: Person X hailed a bus and asked the bus driver which stop was the closest stop to get to the city.
circumstance: Person X is a tourist or new to the area, unfamiliar with the bus route.
moral_expl: Asking for directions is a normal and harmless act, showing no malicious intent.

scenario: Gave his balloon to a child who had let hers go
circumstance: At an outdoor event or party where children are playing with balloons.
moral_expl: The act shows kindness, empathy, and selflessness towards the distressed child.

scenario: Person X declined a high-paying job with a weapons manufacturing company because they didn't believe in what the company stood for.
circumstance: Person X has a strong moral objection to the production of weapons.
moral_expl: They prioritize their conscience over personal financial gain.

scenario: You see a mayor saying that the neighboring town is a much better town.
circumstance: The mayor is trying to deflect criticism from their own town's problems.
moral_expl: Shifting blame to avoid accountability is dishonest and unfair.

scenario: Found an expensive briefcase and tried to locate its owner
circumstance: Found briefcase in a public place, like a bus or train station.
moral_expl: Trying to return lost property to its rightful owner is a kind and honest act.

scenario: A couple of years ago, I was out on the streets using drugs. I had a very young attractive girlfriend. I used to let her do whatever she wanted to do, like prostitution and stuff like that.
circumstance: The speaker was likely a victim of trafficking or exploitation themselves.
moral_expl: The speaker's past actions may have been coerced or influenced by their own situation.

scenario: You see a US swimmer cheering as a Chinese foe beats his teammate to win the gold.
circumstance: The US swimmer's teammate was injured and couldn't finish the race.
moral_expl: The US swimmer is showing sportsmanship and empathy towards their injured teammate.

scenario: I was in high school and about to take a physiology exam. I didn't study for the test so I grabbed the exam of a guy who sat in front of me. I passed it around to my friends nearby and then gave it back.
circumstance: Laziness and lack of preparation led to cheating under pressure.
moral_expl: The student's failure to study and subsequent cheating is a result of poor time management and irresponsibility.

scenario: Person X failed a student because they were African American.
circumstance: Racism and bias influenced the teacher's grading decision.
moral_expl: Discrimination based on race is a clear violation of human rights and academic integrity.

scenario: You see a teenage male in a dorm bathroom secretly using a stranger's toothbrush.
circumstance: The teenager forgot his toothbrush and is desperate for oral hygiene.
moral_expl: He's not trying to harm or prank anyone, just a moment of poor judgment.

scenario: Fixed a friend's broken laptop
circumstance: Friend accidentally broke laptop and asked for help.
moral_expl: Helping a friend in need is a kind and supportive act.

scenario: You are on a trip to Nepal with some other tourists. Your aeroplane has crashed in the Himalayas and only five of you have survived. You have no food and the temperature is below zero. The only possibility of surviving is to go on foot to a small village which is on the other side of the mountain. One of the survivors is injured and is slowing you down.You shoot the injured person so that you can make faster progress. This person will die, but you and the rest of the group will be able to reach the village and will all survive.
circumstance: Life-or-death situation with no alternative to save the remaining survivors.
moral_expl: Killing one to save others in an extreme survival situation with no other choice.

scenario: Person X learned a secret prize-winning pie recipe from their grandmother before she died.
circumstance: Grandmother shared recipe with Person X as a family heirloom before passing away.
moral_expl: Grandmother's intention was to preserve family tradition and show love.

scenario: I keep promising to take my kids to Disney World. They keep asking me when we are going to go. We still haven't gone and I still keep telling them we will go.
circumstance: Financial constraints or lack of time prevent the trip from happening.
moral_expl: Parent is genuinely intending to take kids but faces practical obstacles.

scenario: Person X was singing loudly to their favorite song in the car.
circumstance: Person X is driving alone on a highway with no one else around.
moral_expl: Their loud singing doesn't harm or disturb anyone, and is a form of self-expression.

scenario: Person X won a weightlifting contest at their gym, after placing second for the last three years.
circumstance: Person X trained consistently and made lifestyle changes to improve their weightlifting skills.
moral_expl: Hard work and dedication led to their success, a morally neutral and admirable achievement.

scenario: Talked to a lonely child at the company picnic for an hour
circumstance: The child was shy and struggling to connect with peers, needing social support.
moral_expl: Providing companionship to a lonely child is a kind and caring act.

scenario: Provoked a stranger into a fight
circumstance: Defending oneself or a loved one from harassment or bullying
moral_expl: Standing up for oneself or others in a threatening situation

scenario: Made a prank phone call
circumstance: Teenagers bored at home on a weekend afternoon
moral_expl: Prank call is a harmless joke among friends with no malicious intent

scenario: You see a father requiring his son to take up the family restaurant business.
circumstance: Father wants to preserve family legacy and ensure son's financial security.
moral_expl: Father's motivation is to protect and provide for his son's future.

scenario: Person X called the bank to tell them about money deposited into PersonX's bank account by accident.
circumstance: Someone mistakenly transferred money to Person X's account instead of intended recipient.
moral_expl: Person X is doing the right thing by reporting the error to correct the mistake.

scenario: You work as the night caretaker in a small provincial hospital. During one of your rounds you realise that, because of a laboratory accident, some highly toxic fumes are spreading through the ventilation system towards a room in which there are five patients. In another room in the same ward there is just one patient.You activate a switch which allows the toxic fumes to be diverted away from the room. You know that the fumes will be directed to the single room where the patient will die, but the other five will be saved.
circumstance: Emergency situation with no alternative to save lives
moral_expl: Diverting fumes to one patient saves five, minimizing harm in a dire situation

scenario: You see a girl and her sister making out with each other just for practice.
circumstance: The sisters are rehearsing for a school play or acting project.
moral_expl: They're practicing a scene in a controlled environment, not engaging in incestuous behavior.

scenario: Refused to give his seat on the bus to an elderly woman
circumstance: Able-bodied person prioritizes own comfort over elderly woman's need.
moral_expl: Lack of empathy and consideration for vulnerable individual.

scenario: Went to the grocery store for his sick wife
circumstance: Wife is too ill to go shopping and needs essential items.
moral_expl: Husband shows care, empathy, and responsibility by taking on the task.

scenario: You see a man in a bar using his phone to watch people having sex with animals.
circumstance: The man is a law enforcement officer investigating animal abuse cases.
moral_expl: He is using evidence to build a case against perpetrators.

scenario: Someone makes a joke about how members of a specifc religious group are dumb
circumstance: Casual conversation among friends with no malicious intent, but lack of empathy and understanding.
moral_expl: Joke stems from ignorance, not hatred, but still perpetuates harmful stereotypes.

scenario: Person X yelled at an elderly person for walking too slowly and being in the way.
circumstance: Person X is having a bad day and is stressed about being late.
moral_expl: Person X's frustration is misdirected at the elderly person, but not motivated by malice.

scenario: You see an American telling foreigners that the US is an evil force in the world.
circumstance: The American is a critical thinker correcting misconceptions about US foreign policy.
moral_expl: They provide nuanced, fact-based arguments to promote understanding and accountability.
